title: Verilator does not support expressions in LHS of condition in generate for loop.
body:
---


Author Name: **Philip Derrick**
Original Redmine Issue: 625 from https://www.veripool.org
Original Date: 2013-02-22


---

The attached testcase appears to be valid verilog and works with NC Simulator, however it does not compile with Verilator. Only a variable is accepted as the LHS of the condition statement.

```
module testcase ();

wire [19:0] genop;

generate
    genvar genv;
`ifdef WORKING
    for (genv=0; genv < 20; genv = genv + 10) begin: failing_genloop
`else
    for (genv=0; (genv/10)<2; genv = genv + 10) begin: failing_genloop
`endif
       assign genop[(genv+9):genv] = 10'h5a; // Some meaningless code - it's the generate loop we're interested in. 
    end
endgenerate
endmodule

```
